subcodes.first_line: For this reason must every soul regard all things with his own eyes and not through the eyes of others, and must himself search after truth, until [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لهذا انسان هر چیزی را باید بعین خودش نظر کند نه بدیده دیگران باید خودش تحری حقیقت نماید تا
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @independent investigation of truth; reality
